title: malus sieversii var. chitralensis
intro: Malus sieversii var. chitralensis is a rare and lesser-known variety of wild apple tree native to the mountainous regions of Pakistan and the surrounding areas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Malus sieversii var. chitralensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold, and promoting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
